clinical_blockers: The exact guideline warns that one symptom alone may not indicate thyroid disease and does not enumerate all legacy symptom or examination fields.

Weight change, heat or cold intolerance, palpitations, tremor, bowel habit, skin or hair change, menstrual change, chest-pain or severe-palpitations negatives, broad vitals, eye signs, blood pressure, lymph nodes, previous records, generic clinician plan, medication plan, fixed follow-up intervals, PRN wording, and the combined history draft remain unsupported.
Diagnosis, test interpretation, ultrasound indication, treatment, medicine choice or dose, and referral decisions remain clinician responsibilities.
